textByHashes.12c163c0efffa8d9181dfd7fc2e71944fa48b011: Ook. Ook. Ook Ah Uh! Ook Ah Uh!
textByHashes.a86127e7f4a20f4d15da5fcf1d5731d2c5fd9189: Hello big-big. Aunty told me not to talk to strangers.
textByHashes.d376f9df24e07cd602523017ec2e0bcadd7836e9: Ook! But I don't have any brothers!
textByHashes.c290cec0ff31615a533a20b7e48e7b5a9cda88df: But I don't have any sisters! Ook Ook!
textByHashes.3a50a4a6b09633e090b3b936869a05e93120fa94: Aunty told me not to talk to monkey lovers! Ook!
textByHashes.dc9c8c3c0e110d9399956cb81332a87d7dae4f6b: Uh ah! You do look like my uncle!
textByHashes.592c0746a3b05b3482018f9218ca45d1f1c74d81: You never said what you were!
textByHashes.809521de7e59ae1ff29d2cfec181200e3a0b40a2: You look a lot bigger than last time, Uncle!
textByHashes.8c0d6d4acfae186b8c7190a2de89346152e549dd: Aunty told me to pick loads of bananas. She said if, I got bananas, she'd give me a new toy!
textByHashes.2b0acd99dea30c19fd04f8dc4c4e229b72ed7915: She said it would be something from the magic shop!
textByHashes.417267ecd90ae0c254f33db3194028f758b9c1fc: Twenty! But I can't count! It's very mean of her, isn't it Uncle?
textByHashes.7a842c42c911d41a43bd21f9d5fbedfe90fc83f9: I have no use for that.
textByHashes.75fdd13da9e0359e8cbb7df5b89b6942f458bb27: Did you get any bananas, Uncle?
textByHashes.6f858df6c4c9f6cf79732e5c440cc51198cd4fb6: That doesn't look like 20 bananas Uncle! Aunty will be so angry with me!
textByHashes.ecd96364edee00cdd3e2e9d0363a3dd9c4cf0d94: Wow that's a lot of bananas! Are there twenty?
textByHashes.4d41ef5e8246ae109db763c752430639a63cbcb6: No, not yet... she said she's too busy dealing with something called humans.
textByHashes.5f5153d721b3906daa1a3a935b7c151c3ef546c9: But I only just got it!
textByHashes.cf86c39faa511ef924a1a4ff3d916095a2e170ba: I'm good, uncle! I'd quite like my toy back now...
textByHashes.42fde610f81066258ee8f1f119695df60edcc7c6: You lost it!? What am I going to play with now?
textByHashes.407b1e9e971c53529f0ff711372419c65f93d863: I'm feeling a bit better now...
textByHashes.72c656641a1b5414de9042831bf160c96680eb7a: Yes - Aunty gave me a new toy!
textByHashes.bf7f37e4ac72b768a726fedfb6dbfa270def30b6: Only if you promise to give it back...
textByHashes.d685f6a4875be8fd1c28c5333ed1e8eb0f4ce186: Thank you uncle - I love you!
textByHashes.5e7f22c23f356f6c79d99a164b34f9738c4b4d9c: Thank you uncle, but I don't want one!
textByHashes.fe6fecb1b4ed05c7f62990aae2239926bd1f409e: I don't want that - it looks really scary!
